name: Chick Peas in Olive-Tahini Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red or green bell pepper, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic, onion, and celery to the skillet. Sauté until the onion is translucent.
3. Add bell pepper and continue sautéing until the vegetables are lightly browned.
4. Remove the skillet from heat.
5. Pour the olive-tahini sauce into the skillet and stir in the remaining ingredients (cooked chick peas, wheat germ, soy sauce, marjoram, coriander, and black pepper).
6. Return the skillet to low heat and simmer for 5 to 7 minutes.
7. Serve over rice or other grain.
